operation.add:
<script>
                    $(document).ready(function() {
                        updateCartTime();
                    
                        setInterval(function() {
                            updateCartTime();
                        }, 30000);
                    
                        function updateCartTime() {
                            $.ajax({
                                url: 'index.php?route=checkout/checkout/updateCartTime',
                                type: 'POST',
                                dataType: 'json',
                                success: function(response) {
                                    console.log("Cart time updated", response);
                                    $('.cart-content ul').load('index.php?route=common/cart{{ constant('JOURNAL3_ROUTE_SEPARATOR') }}info{% if journal3_is_oc4 %}&language={{ language }}{% endif %} ul li');
                                },
                                error: function(xhr, status, error) {
                                    console.error("Error:", error);
                                }
                            });
                        }
                    });
                </script>
